metadata.description: AudioContext lifecycle state — 'absent' (off-browser, no Web Audio API), 'suspended' (autoplay-gated, awaiting user gesture), 'running', or 'closed'. Lazily updated by play-tone/play-pcm/stop-all. Hosts can observe to show a 'click to enable sound' affordance.
Master volume 0..1. Read at each play call; multiplied with the per-sound gain. Set with `set` or `setCel`.

metadata.name: sound.play-tone
metadata.description: Play a synthesized oscillator tone. Args: { freq:Hz, duration?:ms = 200, type?:'sine'|'square'|'sawtooth'|'triangle' = 'sine', gain?:0..1 = 0.3 }. Lazily creates + resumes the AudioContext on first call. No-op off-browser.

metadata.name: sound.play-pcm
metadata.description: Play raw PCM samples. Args: { samples:Float32Array (-1..1), rate?:Hz = 44100, channels?:1|2 = 1, gain?:0..1 = 1 }. For >1 channel, samples must be interleaved. No-op off-browser.

metadata.name: sound.stop-all
metadata.description: Stop every active source (tones + PCM). No-op off-browser.

metadata.name: sound.stop-source
metadata.description: Stop the source identified by a handle returned from play-pcm. No-op for an unknown / already-ended handle, and no-op off-browser.

metadata.name: sound.update-source
metadata.description: Adjust gain/pan on a live play-pcm source. Args: (handle, { gain?, pan? }). gain is multiplied with the current master at apply time. No-op for unknown handles / off-browser.

metadata.name: sound.is-playing
metadata.description: Returns true if the handle returned from play-pcm is still playing. Returns false for unknown handles and off-browser.
